esseker.note: Steam search results currently mark this item removed/incompatible for some users; verify availability before spending time tuning it.

rostow.note: Steam search results currently mark this item removed/incompatible for some users; verify availability before spending time tuning it.

spawner_bubaku.mission_source: Steam Workshop ID 2482312670 — subscribed and downloaded
spawner_bubaku.note: Server-side only. Used by Deadfall for AI spawning in underground/inaccessible areas. Config at profiles_deadfall/SpawnerBubaku/SpawnerBubakuV2.json.

gasmasks_only.mission_source: Steam Workshop ID 2621103156 — subscribed and downloaded
gasmasks_only.note: Client+server. Deadfall has a toxic zone passage; this mod makes it traversable without NBC gear grind.

stargate_teleporters.mission_source: Steam Workshop ID 2933015619 — subscribed and downloaded
stargate_teleporters.note: Required dependency for Deadfall. Portal teleport objects (classnames: land_Stargate_Portal, land_Hidden_Portal, etc). Config JSON created at profiles/CBD_PortalTeleporterSystem.json on first boot.

bitterroot.mission_source: https://github.com/Mattty-Ice/Bitterroot-DayZ (bundled mpmissions also in Workshop download at mpmissions/empty.Bitterroot/)
bitterroot.note: 155km² Montana-inspired terrain. Subscribed on Workshop (ID 2906823750). serverDZ_Bitterroot.cfg needs: template = "empty.Bitterroot";

deadfall.mission_source: Steam Workshop ID 3050117454 — subscribed and downloaded
deadfall.note: 10x10km CQB funnel design by Raytone. Self-contained — no external mod dependencies. Junction created at @Deadfall. serverDZ_Deadfall.cfg needs: template = Deadfall;
